login.tagline: Sign in to manage your wardrobe
login.backendErrorDefault: Unable to connect to backend server. Please check that the backend is running.
login.notConfiguredHint: Set {oidc} + {clientId} for SSO, or add {devMode} to the frontend service for local use.
login.terms: By signing in, you agree to our terms of service and privacy policy.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Let's get your digital wardrobe set up in just a few steps.
onboarding.step1Desc: Our AI will automatically tag colors, styles, and more
onboarding.step2Desc: Daily recommendations based on weather and your style
onboarding.step3Desc: Everyone can have their own personalized wardrobe
